sources.reuse_boundary: Preserve shot logic, rhythm, camera grammar, lighting motivation, and emotional structure only.
sources.notes: Do not copy identifiable characters, logos, dialogue, music, exact scene design, or IP symbols.

user_asset_manifest.replaces_reference_function: Reference protagonist function only; do not copy reference character identity.
user_asset_manifest.visible_lock: User-provided face, body type, wardrobe, and medium must be preserved.
user_asset_manifest.inferred_fill: Conservative missing side/back/action views for asset-board continuity.
user_asset_manifest.missing_or_confirm: Confirm any unseen back view, footwear, hand detail, and prop contact.

reference_summary.setup: The protagonist enters a visually constrained space.
reference_summary.development: A prop changes the character's understanding of the situation.
reference_summary.turning_point: The camera movement reveals the hidden meaning.
reference_summary.payoff: A clean final image resolves the emotional question.
reference_summary.ending_image: Locked frame with new symbolic object.

frame_sampling_plan.reason: Uniform frames establish visual style; scene-boundary and audio-aligned frames catch edits, dialogue beats, and action transitions.

frame_observations.subject: Partially framed protagonist hand approaching the key prop.
frame_observations.environment: Interior table surface with shallow background depth.
frame_observations.composition: center-safe prop with hand entering from frame edge
frame_observations.lighting: soft side light from frame left
frame_observations.color_texture: muted neutral palette, tactile matte surfaces

audio_transcript.speaker: none
audio_transcript.audio_event: low room tone with a small tactile sound cue

audio_segments.summary: Silent opening beat uses room tone and tactile sound to focus attention.
audio_segments.rhythm_function: Slow setup with one sound cue near the action.

multimodal_sync.visual_event: Hand approaches prop during slow push-in.
multimodal_sync.audio_event: Room tone continues; tactile cue lands near hand movement.
multimodal_sync.remake_instruction: Keep the sound function and camera timing, replace the prop and setting.

shot_ledger.narrative_function: Open with a detail-first mystery reveal.
shot_ledger.composition: center-safe detail with shallow background depth
shot_ledger.action: A hand approaches the key prop without touching it.
shot_ledger.blocking: Single character remains partially out of frame.
shot_ledger.color: muted neutral palette with one accent color
shot_ledger.sound: low room tone with a small tactile sound cue

preservation_variation_map.preserve_logic: Use a close detail to create curiosity before revealing identity.
preservation_variation_map.replace_with: New original prop and new character context.
preservation_variation_map.reason: The reveal structure is transferable, the original object design is not.
preservation_variation_map.new_prompt_rule: Preserve the reference shot logic, not the original prop design, logo, dialogue, music, or exact scene identity.

new_production_mapping.new_beat: A realistic protagonist notices a newly designed symbolic prop in a different setting.
new_production_mapping.style_migration: Convert animated exaggeration into restrained live-action blocking and natural material response.
new_production_mapping.dialogue_function: No spoken line; let silence and tactile sound hold attention.
new_production_mapping.sound_strategy: Use original sound function only: low room tone plus one new tactile cue.
new_production_mapping.do_not_copy: Do not copy the original characters, prop design, dialogue, music, logo, or exact scene layout.

asset_matrix.name: New Protagonist
asset_matrix.must_preserve: Original new identity and wardrobe continuity.
asset_matrix.forbidden_drift: Do not resemble original reference character or any real celebrity.

asset_matrix.name: New Main Interior
asset_matrix.must_preserve: Spatial anchors and motivated side light.
asset_matrix.forbidden_drift: Do not recreate the original reference location.

asset_matrix.name: New Symbolic Prop
asset_matrix.must_preserve: Shape continuity and scale in hand.
asset_matrix.forbidden_drift: No logos, copied packaging, or original prop silhouette.

scene_geography.light: soft side light from frame left
scene_geography.entrances_exits: Character enters from rear depth and stays camera right.
scene_geography.camera_safe_zones: 9:16 center third for face and prop.

prop_ui_text_matrix.duty: Exact readable text only if needed

segment_plan.beat: Detail-first reveal of the new prop.
segment_plan.in_state: Prop is already placed on the table; protagonist is partially out of frame.
segment_plan.action: Camera slowly pushes in as the hand approaches but does not touch the prop.
segment_plan.out_state: Hand stops near prop; protagonist attention is locked.
segment_plan.fix: If hand contact fails, keep the hand hovering and move contact to next segment.

sound_post_duties.description: Low room tone plus one original tactile sound cue created for the new prop.
sound_post_duties.notes: Do not copy original music or sound asset.

compliance_risks.replace_with: New original prop silhouette and new scene geography.
compliance_risks.prompt_rule: Preserve only the detail-first reveal logic.
